instruction:
Add comprehensive edge case tests for `renv_acls_reset`.


Existing tests for reference:
```r

```


The existing tests cover basic functionality. Add tests for:
1. NULL inputs to each argument
2. Empty vectors/strings: character(0), "", integer(0)
3. Boundary values: 0, 1, -1, NA, NaN, Inf
4. Invalid input types (passing numeric where character expected, etc.)
5. Missing arguments (use expect_error with class matching)
6. Very long inputs (strings > 1000 chars, vectors > 10000 elements)
context:
Package: renv v1.1.7.9000
Description: Project Environments
Function: renv_acls_reset
Parameters: source, target
Test patterns used: test_that
Expectations used: expect_equal

Function Code:
```r
renv_acls_reset <- function(source, target = dirname(source)) {

  # only run on Linux for now
  if (!renv_platform_linux())
    return(FALSE)

  # skip if we don't have 'getfacl', 'setfacl'
  getfacl <- Sys.which("getfacl"); setfacl <- Sys.which("setfacl")
  if (!nzchar(getfacl) || !nzchar(setfacl))
    return(FALSE)

  # build command
  fmt <- "getfacl %s 2> /dev/null | setfacl -R --set-file=- %s 2> /dev/null"
  cmd <- sprintf(fmt, renv_shell_path(target), renv_shell_path(source))

  # execute it
  # TODO: Should we report errors? If so, how?
  catch(
    renv_system_exec(
      command = cmd,
      action = "resetting ACLs",
      quiet = TRUE
    )
  )

}
```
